descripcion: Read about Emma's day at school and answer comprehension questions!

misiones.instruccion: Read each part of the story, then answer the question!

parrafos.texto: Emma wakes up at seven o'clock every morning. She eats breakfast with her family. She drinks orange juice and eats toast.
parrafos.traduccion: Emma se despierta a las siete cada mañana. Desayuna con su familia. Toma jugo de naranja y come pan tostado.

parrafos.texto: She walks to school with her brother Tom. They don't take the bus because the school is very close. Tom always walks fast!
parrafos.traduccion: Camina a la escuela con su hermano Tom. No toman el camión porque la escuela está muy cerca. Tom siempre camina rápido!

preguntas.oracion: Emma goes to school by bus.
preguntas.correccion: Emma walks to school. The school is very close.

parrafos.texto: At school, Emma studies English and math. She likes English the most! Her teacher speaks English very well.
parrafos.traduccion: En la escuela, Emma estudia inglés y mates. Le gusta más el inglés! Su maestra habla inglés muy bien.

parrafos.texto: After school, Emma plays in the park with her friends. They run, jump, and dance together. Emma always has fun!
parrafos.traduccion: Después de la escuela, Emma juega en el parque con sus amigos. Corren, saltan y bailan juntos. Emma siempre se divierte!

preguntas.correccion: Emma plays with her friends in the park.

parrafos.texto: In the evening, Emma does her homework and reads a book. She goes to bed at nine o'clock. Good night, Emma!
parrafos.traduccion: En la noche, Emma hace su tarea y lee un libro. Se acuesta a las nueve. Buenas noches, Emma!

preguntas.oracion: She ___ to bed at nine o'clock.
